ddls:
CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job listing */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company posting the job */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job */,
  "involvement" TEXT /* Type of involvement (e.g., Full-time, Part-time) */,
  "workplace_type" TEXT /* Type of workplace (e.g., On-site, Remote) */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry of the job */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers of the job listing */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the job posting */,
  "posted_date" TEXT /* Date the job was posted */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of the job */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state of the job */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city of the job */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of the job (e.g., Associate, Full-time) */,
  "applicants" INTEGER /* Number of applicants for the job */,
  "skills" TEXT /* Skills required for the job */,
  "job_class" TEXT /* Class of the job */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Range of the salary offered */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits provided by the company */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job */,
  "application_requirements" TEXT /* Requirements for applying to the job */,
  "posting_source" TEXT /* Source from which the job is posted (e.g., LinkedIn, company website) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the job posting is active */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the job has received */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks the job has received */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of times the job has been saved */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of times the job has been shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry of the company */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the company */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the company */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the company's logo */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the company is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the state is in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the city is in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job application */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job listing */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who applied */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the user applied for the job */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., Applied, Interviewing, Hired) */,
  "cover_letter" TEXT /* Cover letter submitted by the applicant */,
  "resume_url" TEXT /* URL of the applicant's resume */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date of the interview (if applicable) */,
  "interviewer_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the interviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applicants_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applicants_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., job seeker, recruiter) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job listing */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who viewed the job */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the job was viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_views_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_saves" (
  "save_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each save event */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job listing */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who saved the job */,
  "save_date" TEXT /* Date when the job was saved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("save_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_saves_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_saves_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share event */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job listing */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who shared the job */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date when the job was shared */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform on which the job was shared (e.g., LinkedIn, Twitter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_shares_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_searches" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Search query performed by the user */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date when the search was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_searches_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_clicks" (
  "click_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each click event */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job listing */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who clicked on the job */,
  "click_date" TEXT /* Date when the job was clicked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("click_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_clicks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_clicks_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job listing */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who provided feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_feedback_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job listing */,
  "requirement_text" TEXT /* Detailed requirement for the job */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Indicates if the requirement is mandatory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_requirements_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_skills" (
  "user_skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user skill */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the skill */,
  "proficiency_level" TEXT /* Proficiency level of the user in the skill (e.g., Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_skills_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_skills_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES job_skills ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "preference_type" TEXT /* Type of preference (e.g., location, industry) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
